reviewFocus: Check whether each public-facing claim is proportional to the support listed in the packet.
Flag missing or weak caveats when the evidence is qualitative, self-selected, small-sample, or not tied to a stronger outcome.
Check that source traceability is understandable without exposing private account data or real customer facts.
Keep publication approval, brand strategy, proof thresholds, and follow-up routing caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer real account identity, revenue, conversion, endorsement, audience size, or market validation.
Do not approve publication or decide whether the evidence should be used in a final creative surface.
Do not treat the fixture as a rendered page, visual design, or call-to-action review unless the packet itself makes a rendered-surface claim.
